div.title: An API (Application Programming Interface) is a collection of protocols and subroutines for building software.
Machine learning is a way of modeling and interpreting data that allows a piece of software to respond intelligently.
Deep learning is a subset of machine learning that uses multi-layered neural networks to learn representations from data.
A bot is an application that runs automated tasks over the Internet.
The GitHub API allows you to build applications that integrate with GitHub.
Compilers are software that translate higher-level programming languages to lower-level languages (e.g. machine code).
Minecraft is a sandbox video game.
Lua is a lightweight, embeddable scripting language.
The coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) is an infectious disease caused by SARS-CoV-2.
